description: Product Description colgate max fresh clean mint 100ml import green Directions Apply a pea-sized amount to the toothbrush, brush in a circular motion, pay attention to all tooth surfaces, brush for 2 minutes and then rinse. Safety Warning For baby use, keep out of reach of children. If ingested, seek medical help. People with gluten intolerance should avoid use if ingredient concerns arise.
